text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey gets injured during training, so I
bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Owww... Hehe, sorry, Trainer. I kinda messed up.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But, it doesn't hurt much. I'll be fine! Let's head
back and finish our training!
choice_data_list: No, you need to rest up.
You have to be careful, though.
You have to be careful, though.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But, it doesn't hurt much. I'll be fine! Let's head
back and finish our training!
choice_data_list: No, you need to rest up.
You have to be careful, though.
You have to be careful, though.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh?! B-but, an injury like this...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No, ignoring my injury won't improve my luck. In
fact, it may actually throw off my inner qi and
make my luck worse.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Patience is key. I need to rest up, just as you said,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to convince Copano Rickey to focus on
rest and recuperation, but she still looks
somewhat crestfallen.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I have to prove to everyone that feng shui can
even help you overcome injuries!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! The qi disrupted by my injury should be
stabilized now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ouch?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Owww... It's started aching again...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Traineeer! Looks like I can't train today after all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I gently reassure Copano Rickey that everyone
occasionally has days like this and then escort her
back to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this feels good! The qi is pushing at my
back and driving me forward!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: If I just keep this up... HYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Copano Rickey races around the track
being careful not to strain her injury.
